description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a blue gable roof and a prominent red brick chimney. The exterior walls are light gray with brown wooden trim, and the house features a fenced yard with green grass. The front facade has a wooden door with a vertical handle, a small porch covered by an awning, and a set of stepping stones leading to the entrance. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the upper floor, while the lower floor includes a bay window and a covered side area. Additional details include a side balcony, a utility pole with a wire, and a wooden fence enclosing the property.
description: A two-story house with a blue gable roof, light gray walls, brown trim, and a fenced yard. Features include a front porch, chimney, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch with awning, bay window, and stepping stones leading to the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical upper windows, covered porch area, and a row of barrels or containers beneath the awning.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall, chimney, and the full length of the wooden fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring a balcony, side door, utility pole with wire, and additional fencing.
attribute_entryway_design: Wooden door with vertical handle, small covered porch with awning, and stepping stones leading to the entrance.
